reason: The image depicts a group of scholars (presumably monks) studying and copying texts in a stone building illuminated by candlelight, fitting the general time period. The architecture looks appropriate for the late 11th century, and the clothing appears consistent with monastic robes. The use of quills, parchment books, and simple wooden tables also align with the setting. However, the quality of paper seems too good for the epoch, furthermore the faces of the characters seem too modern. Still, the image successfully captures the atmosphere of scholarly dedication and rudimentary technology of the time.
